claims.statement: All nine agents now have concise operating contracts that define mission, authority, escalation, and expected artifacts.
limitations: Contracts remain conceptual and are not yet coupled to live runtime enforcement.
No automated completeness check is included in this release.
claims.decisionNotes: Accepted as a governance and packaging deepening claim rather than a runtime automation claim.

claims.statement: The package now includes a machine-readable claim register that ties release statements to artifacts, findings, and limitations.
limitations: The claim register is authored by hand in this release.
No external validator or export pipeline is packaged.
claims.decisionNotes: Included because it improves inspectability of claims without overstating automation.
